message:
fix: rewrite orphan reaper with allowlist to prevent killing SSH proxy sessions

The broad command.contains('wezterm cli') match killed legitimate
wezterm cli --prefer-mux proxy SSH transport sessions. Replaced with
proper token-based parsing: verifies binary basename, extracts subcommand
after 'cli', and checks against an explicit allowlist of ft-owned
short-lived helpers. Includes 17 unit tests.

Closes #38
Closes #39

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
